/home/user/project/main.js:15
  items.foo.bar;
            ^

TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'bar')
    at processItems (/home/user/project/main.js:15:13)
    at main (/home/user/project/main.js:23:3)
    at Object.<anonymous> (/home/user/project/main.js:27:1)
